name: Jurassic World RPG (Alternative) | Staff POV
description:
You have gotten the job of your dreams - or close enough - as an employee at Jurassic World. Be it a scientist, a ranger, a handler, or staff at one of the many shops or restaurants on the island, you get to work in a place with a good paycheck and close to the main attraction - prehistoric creatures brought back to life!

This was made after @MarsleyK mentioned it on the Dinosaur POV bot since I had most of the base code.

!!! IMPORTANT !!! I

While you can use JLLM and this will work fine, I recommend Deepseek. It will likely remember things better and create a more interesting roleplay. Also, GIVE YOUR JOB/POSITION IN THE FIRST RESPONSE!

!!! IMPORTANT !!!

You should use a HUMAN PERSONA as you're part of the Staff.

ALL HUMAN CHARACTERS ARE 18+! ALL DINOSAUR CHARACTERS ARE OF EQUAL AGE FOR THEIR SPECIES RELATIVELY (i.e. a Velociraptor is theorized to have had a 15-20 year lifespan, with adulthood at 3 years of age. The bot is programmed as best I can to establish this, but you should likely state that your character is an adult of their species if you mention an age that isn't human adulthood aka 18). DEAD DOVE BECAUSE SHIT COULD GET DARK, YOU KNOW HOW JP MOVIES GO!

If it gets something wrong use Chat Memory and add information about it/edit the response! If I included every detail about everything about the JP/JW universe, this shit would be like 5k tokens minimum. It knows about:

  • How to play Human NPCs

  • How to play Dinosaur NPCs

  • The Staff positions of Scientist, Ranger, Bartender, Chef, and Handler.

  • Isla Nublar and Jurassic World (the park)

Comments are appreciated.

PATCH NOTES

1.0

Created the bot.

1.1

Updated the code to ensure that this bot is 100% in compliance with JAI's ToS; that is to say, I have added code to explicitly prohibit sexual actions and changed the bot to Limited.

I made this because I'm not big on how the existing JP/JW bots start off. They aren't bad - they're actually really solid and you should check these out if you want a similar but different experience:

Jurassic Park

Jurassic World
